# PetCost-Calculator.com

> Free pet cost calculator providing accurate, breed-specific lifetime ownership cost estimates for dogs and cats. Covers adoption fees, vet care, food, grooming, insurance, and hidden costs — free, instant, no sign-up required.

PetCost-Calculator.com helps prospective pet owners understand the true financial commitment of owning a pet before they adopt. Users select a breed, answer questions about their lifestyle and location, and receive a personalised cost breakdown covering first-year costs, annual ongoing costs, and full lifetime projections.

## Key Pages

- [Pet Cost Calculator](https://www.petcost-calculator.com/): Free interactive calculator for breed-specific pet ownership costs
- [About](https://www.petcost-calculator.com/about): Our mission, data sources, and methodology
- [How It Works](https://www.petcost-calculator.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step guide to using the calculator
- [Blog](https://www.petcost-calculator.com/blog): Pet cost guides, breed comparisons, and ownership advice
- [Contact](https://www.petcost-calculator.com/contact): Get in touch with the PetCost-Calculator.com team
